description: France is monitoring one reported MV Hondius-linked passenger after symptoms were noted during repatriation travel. The case is tracked as a monitored/probable signal pending official classification.
verificationNotes: Updated per May 2026 multi-country Andes hantavirus situation tracking. WHO assesses the public risk as low while international contact tracing continues.

description: Spain is shown with one monitored signal linked to the MV Hondius response and Tenerife evacuation/testing operation. Spanish authorities handled controlled disembarkation and onward repatriation flights.
verificationNotes: Marker represents the Spain-related surveillance and testing event from the May 2026 response, not community transmission.

description: Israel is listed with one reported Andes hantavirus case associated with the wider MV Hondius multi-country cluster and ongoing passenger follow-up.
verificationNotes: Included in the May 11 country-level case distribution supplied for HantaWorld's frontend update.

description: The United States is listed with three reported cases or monitored case-level signals linked to repatriated MV Hondius passengers and CDC-led assessment after return travel.
verificationNotes: Updated May 11, 2026. Returning passengers are subject to clinical assessment and monitoring guidance.

description: Argentina remains central to the exposure investigation because the index case is believed to have had possible environmental exposure during travel in southern South America before boarding the MV Hondius.
verificationNotes: WHO reports that investigations continue into the first case's travel history and possible rodent exposure in the Southern Cone region.

description: Tristan da Cunha is listed with one reported MV Hondius-linked Andes hantavirus case-level signal after a passenger disembarked there and later developed compatible symptoms.
verificationNotes: WHO described the Tristan da Cunha-linked case as probable in its 8 May update; HantaWorld shows the country-level signal requested for the May 11 frontend refresh.
